2605.11813.title: Automated Reformulation of Robust Optimization via Memory-Augmented Large Language Models
2605.11813.paper_summary: Robust optimization (RO) provides a principled framework for decision-making under uncertainty, but its practical use is often limited by the need to manually reformulate uncertain optimization models into tractable deterministic counterparts. Recent large language models (LLMs) have been shown promising for automating optimization formulation, yet RO reformulation remains challenging because it requires precise multi-step reasoning and mathematically consistent transformations. To facilitate systematic evaluation of LLM-based reformulation, for which no dedicated benchmark currently exists, we develop AutoRO-Bench, a benchmark featuring an automated data generation pipeline for the core RO reformulation task and a curated dataset for the RO application task. To address the reformulation challenge, we propose Automated Reformulation with Experience Memory (AutoREM), a tuning-free memory-augmented framework that autonomously builds a structured textual experience memory by reflecting on past failed trajectories through a tailored offline adaptation procedure. AutoREM requires neither domain-specific expert knowledge nor parameter updates, and the resulting memory readily transfers across different base LLMs. Experimental results show that AutoREM consistently improves the accuracy and efficiency of RO reformulation across in-distribution datasets, out-of-distribution datasets, and diverse base LLMs.
2605.11813.paper_summary_zh: 穩健優化（RO）提供了一個在不確定性下進行決策的原則性框架，但其實際應用常常受到需要手動將不確定的優化模型重新表述為可處理的確定性對應模型的限制。最近的大型語言模型（LLMs）在自動化優化表述方面顯示出良好的前景，但RO的重新表述仍然具有挑戰性，因為它需要精確的多步推理和數學上一致的轉換。為了促進基於LLM的重新表述的系統評估，目前尚不存在專門的基準，我們開發了AutoRO-Bench，這是一個基準，具有自動化數據生成管道，用於核心RO重新表述任務，以及一個精心策劃的數據集，用於RO應用任務。為了解決重新表述的挑戰，我們提出了經驗記憶自動重新表述（AutoREM），這是一個無需調整的記憶增強框架，通過針對過去失敗軌跡的反思，通過量身定制的離線適應程序，自主構建結構化的文本經驗記憶。AutoREM不需要特定領域的專家知識或參數更新，所得到的記憶可以輕鬆轉移到不同的基礎LLM上。實驗結果顯示，AutoREM在分佈內數據集、分佈外數據集和多樣的基礎LLM上，持續提高了RO重新表述的準確性和效率。
2605.11813.author: Jinbiao Chen et.al.
2605.11813.authors: Jinbiao Chen, Shuang Jin, Guoyun Zhang, Junyu Zhang, Guanyi Wang, Hanzhang Qin
